gartnerDeloitte2026ForecastsGlobal: Gartner & Deloitte 2026 Forecasts · Global IT Spending $6.15T
getTheSundayPrepNewsletter: Get the Sunday Prep newsletter — top earnings plays, momentum scans, and macro outlook delivered weekly.
globalInvestmentMomentumTowardsAi: Global investment momentum towards AI infrastructure continues in 2026. Hyperscaler cloud providers (Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Meta) are designing their own custom AI chips; this creates strong structural demand for custom ASIC design companies like MRVL and AVGO. ASML's CEO clearly stated in April 2026 that "chip demand is exceeding supply" — this is the strongest signal that the sector is in structural rather than cyclical growth.

highIvCrushButVery: High IV crush but very risky. Prefer Sell Straddle or IV crush play, avoid directional risk.
highIvCrushButVeryd2f9: High IV crush but very risky. Avoid or do IV crush play, avoid directional risk.
highMomentumHighIvCrush: High momentum + High IV crush potential. Buy Long Call 15 days before, sell 1-2 days before. Maximize benefit from IV expansion.
holdSignalsDoNotDisappear: Hold signals do not disappear here. This block collects names carrying movement, regime transition, or unresolved conviction before direction becomes clear.
ifEarningsAreAnnouncedThursday: If earnings are announced Thursday/Friday, Friday options are very risky. Prefer the previous week's Friday options.

Data compiled from Yahoo Finance, MarketBeat, ChartMill, Gartner, Deloitte sources.
thisReportIsForInformational492e: This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice. Every trade decision should be based on your own risk tolerance.
thisScreenNoLongerShows: This screen no longer shows static seeds or fabricated fallbacks. The benchmark appears here once a real weekly report is published from the admin workspace.
thisSectionTurnsTheGlobal: This section turns the global risk matrix, position sizing, golden rules, and daily checklist blocks from the markdown file into a single management layer.
thisSurfaceFirstPullsThe: This surface first pulls the snapshot, then re-weighs the same universe through the live scanner. The upper layer gives you the market balance at a glance, while the lower layer surfaces leaders, breakdowns, and signal shifts.
thisTabCombinesTheWeekly: This tab combines the weekly action plan, macro conflict dates, and ticker-specific entry and exit windows into a single timeline.
thisTabNoLongerShows: This tab no longer shows static IV crush fallback. As the option/IV layer arrives in published weekly reports, rankings and charts will form here.
thisTabNoLongerUses: This tab no longer uses static earnings seeds. When a weekly report is published on the admin side, the calendar will appear here sorted by date.
thisViewOpensTheSelected: This view opens the selected momentum markdown file as a post flow where regime, candidates, catalysts, and the full source content stay in one readable stream.
totalCandidatesParsedFromThe: Total candidates parsed from the selected momentum markdown file.

whenThereIsNoLive: When there is no live signal shift, we pin the sharpest intraday move here.
